commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 36%, while the sportsbook consensus favors the USA at 53%—a 21-percentage-point gap on the home win. The market also assigns the draw just 26%, well below the model's 31%. These gaps could reflect recent lineup changes, form swings, or injury news that has moved real money since the model's last training cycle, though the model itself has no visibility into such developments. The dashboard flags this as a genuine disagreement between statistical expectation and live-market pricing, not a judgment on which source is correct.
